steps.title: Read species Y frequency from the table
steps.content: From the frequency table, species Y has frequency 3, and the total is 185 animals.

steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
Probability of selecting species Y:

$$P(\text{species Y}) = \frac{\text{favorable outcomes}}{\text{total outcomes}} = \frac{3}{185}$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
